text_excerpt: In Parliament - Justin Madders Skip to main content Justin Madders Labour MP for Ellesmere Port & Bromborough Join Get Involved Donate About Contact News In Parliament Need my help? Privacy Policy More Menu In Parliament A log of Justin's interventions in the House of Commons can be found below. Department for Transport: Motor Vehicles 29 Apr 2026 Department for Transport Justin Madders received a response to a question they put to the government To ask the Secretary of State for Transport, what percentage of cars rented by her department are a) electric and b) UK made and what steps she is taking to encourage departmental travel... Read more → Eating Disorders: Ellesmere Port and Bromborough 29 Apr 2026 Department of Health and Social Care Justin Madders received a response to a question they put to the government To ask the Secretary of State for Health and Social Care, what steps he is taking to enable patients with eating disorders in Ellesmere Port and Bromborough constituency to access specialist services. Read more → Eating Disorders: Ellesmere Port and Bromborough 29 Apr 2026 Department of Health and Social Care Justin Madders received a response to a question they put to the government To ask the Secretary of State for Health and Social Care, what assessment he has made of the suitability of the provision of specialist eating disorder support for patients in Ellesmere Port and... Read more → Eating Disorders: Ellesmere Port and Bromborough 29 Apr 2026 Department of Health and Social Care Justin Madders received a response to a question they put to the government To ask the Secretary of State for Health and Social Care, what estimate he has made of the number of patients referred to care outside the local area for patients with eating disorders in... Read more → Eating Disorders: Ellesmere Port and Bromborough 29 Apr 2026 Department of Health and Social Care Justin Madders received a response to a question they put to the government To ask the Secretary of State for Health and Social Care, what assessment he has made of the availability of specialist eating disorder support for patients in Ellesmere Port and Bromborough. Read more → Refineries 28 Apr 2026 Department for Energy Security and Net Zero Justin Madders received a response to a question they put to the government To ask the Secretary of State for Energy Security and Net Zero, what steps he is taking to support the refineries sector while oil supplies are disrupted due to military conflict in the Middle East. Read more → Refineries: UK Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism 28 Apr 2026 Treasury Justin Madders received a response to a question they put to the government To ask the Chancellor of the Exchequer, what assessment she has made of the potential economic impact of delaying the inclusion of the refineries sector in a CBAM on the sector. Read more → Department for Transport: Electric Vehicles 28 Apr 2026 Department for Transport Justin Madders received a response to a question they put to the government To ask the Secretary of State for Transport, whether her department encourages officials to rent electric vehicles when hiring vehicles for official business.
